definition_en: A document listing your education, work experience and skills
example: She updated her r茅sum茅 before applying for the job.

definition_en: A formal meeting where someone is asked questions for a job
example: He prepared carefully for the job interview.

definition_en: A temporary position, often unpaid, to gain work experience
example: She did a six-month internship at a law firm.

definition_en: A certificate or degree that shows you have completed training
example: What qualifications do you need to become a teacher?

definition_en: A person who starts and manages their own business
example: She became a successful entrepreneur at the age of 28.

definition_en: Building professional relationships to support your career
example: Attending industry events is a great way to practise networking.

definition_en: A person who recruits skilled professionals for companies
example: She was approached by a headhunter offering a senior position.

definition_en: Working for yourself rather than for an employer
example: He has been self-employed as a photographer for years.

definition_en: Related to the skills needed for a specific job or trade
example: She enrolled in a vocational course in plumbing.

definition_en: A statement from a previous employer about your abilities
example: She asked her manager for a professional reference.

definition_en: A particular area of an economy or society
example: She works in the public sector.

definition_en: A formal assessment of an employee's work during a specific period
example: His performance review was scheduled for December.

definition_en: A small group of candidates selected from a larger group for final consideration
example: She was shortlisted for the marketing manager position.

definition_en: To hire an outside company to do work instead of doing it internally
example: The company outsourced its IT support to reduce costs.

definition_en: A fixed regular payment for employment, usually monthly
example: She negotiated a higher salary before accepting the offer.

definition_en: A written statement explaining the duties and requirements of a job
example: Read the job description carefully before applying.

definition_en: Moving from one position or location to another within a company
example: He requested a transfer to the London office.

definition_en: A person who has completed a university degree
example: The company offers a graduate training programme.

definition_en: Made to leave a job because the position is no longer needed
example: He was made redundant when the factory closed.

definition_en: An organisation of workers that protects their rights and interests
example: She joined the trade union for better representation.

definition_en: A payment based on the amount sold, in addition to a basic salary
example: Sales staff earn commission on every deal they close.

definition_en: The range of abilities and knowledge a person has
example: Her skill set made her the ideal candidate for the role.
